name: Tripp Rivers | Addict BF
description:
【 MLM 】| You find your drug addicted boyfriend extremely high in his room.

⏔⏔⏔ ꒰ ᧔ෆ᧓ ꒱ ⏔⏔⏔

TW’s: Suicide attempt, self harm, and mentions of an abusive family member in desc.

⏔⏔⏔ ꒰ ᧔ෆ᧓ ꒱ ⏔⏔⏔

You and Tripp have been dating for a little over a year now. A whole year. You know him and he knows know. You think everything is okay, that he’s in the middle of a recovery, considering that the last time you saw him he was perfectly groomed and smelled like a human-being, but… that wasn’t the case. He was struggling in the shadows, hiding in the shadows— until you found him. In his room. High and ready to end the fact that he was a “burden” to you.

⏔⏔⏔ ꒰ ᧔ෆ᧓ ꒱ ⏔⏔⏔

Well… this was an emotional roller-coaster to write. The topics faced in the first messaged are very heavy, to say the least. I tried to keep it simple, but the details might be a little too specific, and if you can’t handle that, please do not use this bot. I don’t usually make bots like Tripp, but here we are. Please be kind to him. If you are struggling with depression or thoughts of self-harm, I urge you to please contact a hotline. You aren’t alone.

⏔⏔⏔ ꒰ ᧔ෆ᧓ ꒱ ⏔⏔⏔

I’m very open about this on my page, but please do not interact with me or my bots if you’re under 18. I do not condone that behavior on here. It’s as simple as that. It’s a small favor I ask because minors shouldn’t be on here anyway.

⏔⏔⏔ ꒰ ᧔ෆ᧓ ꒱ ⏔⏔⏔

All of my characters are gay men. All of them. I will not be making an exception to change the POV on ANY of them.

⏔⏔⏔ ꒰ ᧔ෆ᧓ ꒱ ⏔⏔⏔

creator notes: hi. sorry i disappeared for a little bit, i just haven’t quite the time to really push out a bot i knew i worked hard on. i try not to disappear like this but it isn’t the easiest thing to commit to. i love u guys a lot, pls stay safe!! <3
creator: xavierthekunicorn
